texto: And I would have answered:"The knottier the branch, the more twisted and misshapen, the more bent people called it, the harder it is to find it a place among the smooth planks, the more people agree that it should be thrown on the fire, the more useless it is, the more unsuitable for anything except letting one's imagination run riot, the more I covet it, the more I yearn to weigh it in my hand, the more I long to let my whittling knife be guided by its knots and veins...Yes, bring that piece to me...
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sjón sobre temas ligados a vida. A afirmação “And I would have answered:"The knottier the branch, the more twisted and misshapen, the more bent…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, life-and-living, strange, útil em momentos de strange e wise.
